issues.title: Missing unit test file for ReportsPage component
issues.description: ReportsPage component has no corresponding .test.tsx file. This is a main page component that handles loading states, error states, filter changes, and export functionality - all critical for testing.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/presentation/pages/ReportsPage.test.tsx with tests for: loading state, error state, filter change propagation, export button state (enabled/disabled), export action.

issues.title: Missing unit test file for ReportFiltersBar component
issues.description: ReportFiltersBar is a complex filter component with multiple inputs (date range, status select, currency select, amount range, clear button). It has no unit tests despite having tid() attributes.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/presentation/components/ReportFiltersBar.test.tsx with tests for: date range filter changes, status filter changes, currency filter changes, amount range filter changes, clear button functionality, callback invocation.

issues.title: Missing unit test file for ReportTable component
issues.description: ReportTable is a data display component with complex data transformation logic (displaying multiple items per order, formatting currencies and dates, status badges). No unit tests exist.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/presentation/components/ReportTable.test.tsx with tests for: empty state rendering, order rendering with multiple items, order rendering without items, currency formatting, date formatting, receipt link rendering.

issues.title: Missing unit test file for OrderStatusBadge component
issues.description: OrderStatusBadge has complex conditional styling logic (STATUS_COLOR_MAP with multiple status types) but no unit tests. Also lacks tid() attribute even though it's used in the table.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/presentation/components/OrderStatusBadge.test.tsx with tests for all status types in STATUS_COLOR_MAP. Add tid() attribute for E2E testability.

issues.title: Missing unit test file for useReportOrders hook
issues.description: useReportOrders is a custom hook combining useQuery and useQueryStates. It has no unit tests for state management, filter handling, or query execution.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/application/hooks/useReportOrders.test.ts with tests for: filter state initialization, filter updates, query execution, loading/error states, data transformation.

issues.title: Missing unit test file for exportOrdersToExcel utility
issues.description: exportOrdersToExcel has complex XML generation logic with XML escaping, cell formatting, and order/item flattening. No unit tests for this critical business logic.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/reports/application/utils/exportOrdersToExcel.test.ts with tests for: XML escaping (special characters), cell generation, number cell generation, single-item orders, multi-item orders, orders without items, header row generation.

issues.title: Inconsistent tid() import path
issues.description: ReportTable imports tid from 'shared' while ReportsPage and ReportFiltersBar import from '@/shared/infrastructure/config/tid'. This inconsistency could lead to module resolution issues.
issues.fix: Change 'import { tid } from "shared";' to 'import { tid } from "@/shared/infrastructure/config/tid";' for consistency with other components in the feature.

issues.title: Missing test ID on OrderStatusBadge component
issues.description: OrderStatusBadge component has no tid() attribute. While E2E tests can still target it through the table row, granular testing would benefit from a dedicated test ID.
issues.fix: Add {...tid('order-status-badge')} or status-specific tid like {...tid(`order-status-${status}`)} to the span element.

issues.title: E2E test uses getByText() for data visibility
issues.description: Line 261 uses page.getByText(TEST_ORDER.transfer_number) to verify the order is displayed. While this works, it could be more resilient with a dedicated test ID on the transfer number cell.
issues.fix: Add tid() to transfer number cell in ReportTable, then update E2E test to use getByTestId() instead of getByText() for better resilience to formatting changes.

issues.title: E2E test quality is good - follows best practices
issues.description: The E2E test follows testing rules well: uses test IDs consistently, no toContainText/toHaveText, proper async handling with waitForTimeout and DEBOUNCE_WAIT_MS, ARIA/data attributes for state assertions. Good coverage of happy path, filters, export, and access control.
issues.fix: No action required. E2E test is well-structured. Consider these enhancements: 1) Add granular test IDs to table rows and individual cells for more specific assertions. 2) Test empty state explicitly. 3) Add edge case tests for malformed data.

immediate: Create unit tests for all components, hooks, and utilities
Add test ID to OrderStatusBadge component
short_term: Add granular test IDs to table rows and cells
Enhance E2E tests with more edge cases (empty states, malformed data)
Add unit tests for error boundaries and error states
recommendations.testing_strategy: The reports feature uses a solid E2E test foundation with good practices. However, it lacks unit test coverage for critical business logic (data export, filtering, state management). Priority should be: 1) Hook tests (data fetching), 2) Utility tests (export logic), 3) Component tests (UI interactions).
